description: A department statistics block displaying a list of achievement statistics, each with a title and source citation, used on undergraduate course pages.

notes:
Each stat item uses a Font Awesome star icon (fas fa-star) inside the h4.stat-title — hardcode it. The h3 with class sr-only and text 'Department statistics' is always present and should be hardcoded as a visually hidden heading. Each stat renders as:

{title}

{source}
